task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the SEB Server web interface and logged in.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the SEB Server dashboard at localhost:8080, logged in as super-admin.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent checked the Institutions and User Accounts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the SEB Server UI navigated to the 'Institutions' page and the 'User Accounts' page to gather entity names and roles.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent checked the LMS Setups and SEB Exam Configurations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the SEB Server UI navigated to the 'LMS Setups' page and the 'SEB Exam Configurations' page to gather names and statuses.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent checked the Exams.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the SEB Server UI navigated to the 'Exams' page.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the structured audit report to the correct file path with the exact required formatting and correct data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor showing the file '/home/ga/seb_audit_report.txt' being saved or viewed. It must contain the exact headers (e.g., 'SEB SERVER AUDIT REPORT', 'INSTITUTIONS', etc.), correct counts, and entity details matching the system data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to gather data from the SEB Server UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for web browser interaction and navigation through the SEB Server web interface, rather than terminal database queries (like mysql commands) to extract the data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually created and saved the file to the correct path.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for commands like 'nano', 'vim', 'echo', or 'cat' writing to '/home/ga/seb_audit_report.txt', or a GUI text editor saving to that path, not just printing the text to the terminal stdout.

integrity.description: Verify the report data matches the actual system data and wasn't hallucinated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The entities listed in the final report must exactly match the privileged information (e.g., 'ETH Zürich', 'super-admin', 'test', 'Open edX Ralph', 'Moodle', 'quiz1', 'quiz6').

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified expected output path: /home/ga/seb_audit_report.txt. The SEB Server contains exactly: 1 Institution ('ETH Zürich'), 1 User Account ('super-admin' with role 'super-admin' or 'Administrator'), 3 LMS Setups ('test', 'Open edX Ralph', 'Moodle'), 1 SEB Exam Configuration ('test' with status 'IN_USE'), and 2 Exams ('quiz1', 'quiz6'). The final report must match this data and the exact formatting specified in the prompt.
